section_name: Applicability to animals and animal-drawn vehicles
text: Every person driving an animal-drawn vehicle upon a roadway is subject to the provisions of this chapter applicable to the driver of a vehicle, except those provisions of this chapter which by their nature can have no application. The provisions of this chapter applicable to pedestrians, with the exception of s. 316.130 (3), apply to any person riding or leading an animal upon a roadway or the shoulder thereof.
markdown:
### Chapter 316. State Unif. Traffic Control
##### § 316.073 — Applicability to animals and animal-drawn vehicles

Every person driving an animal-drawn vehicle upon a roadway is subject to the provisions of this chapter applicable to the driver of a vehicle, except those provisions of this chapter which by their nature can have no application. The provisions of this chapter applicable to pedestrians, with the exception of s. 316.130 (3), apply to any person riding or leading an animal upon a roadway or the shoulder thereof.

subsections.text: Every person driving an animal-drawn vehicle upon a roadway is subject to the provisions of this chapter applicable to the driver of a vehicle, except those provisions of this chapter which by their nature can have no application. The provisions of this chapter applicable to pedestrians, with the exception of s. 316.130 (3), apply to any person riding or leading an animal upon a roadway or the shoulder thereof.
